data.title: MegaETH: MEGA tokens will be distributed before 19:00.
data.description: According to an official announcement from MegaETH, MEGA tokens will be distributed to users before 19:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: Crypto-Related Stocks See Pre-Market Gains
data.description: US pre-market trading saw a rise in crypto-related stocks. According to NS3.AI, ABTC increased by 0.88%, MARA by 0.84%, COIN by 0.31%, MSTR by 0.28%, and CRCL by 0.45%.

data.title: Iran's Supreme Leader: Iran's fate is intertwined with that of its Gulf neighbors.
data.description: According to Iranian media reports on April 30, Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei stated that Iran's fate is intertwined with that of its Gulf neighbors, and that "evil foreigners" have nowhere to hide and deserve only to sink into "the deep waters." (Xinhua)

data.title: Greece Lowers 2026 Economic Growth Forecast Due to Middle East Conflict
data.description: Greece has revised its economic growth forecast for 2026, reducing it from 2.4% to 2.0% due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. According to Jin10, the adjustment reflects concerns over the potential impact of regional instability on global markets and Greece's economic outlook. The decision underscores the challenges faced by countries in maintaining growth amid geopolitical tensions.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with ABTC up 0.88%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with COIN up 0.31%, MSTR up 0.28%, ABTC up 0.88%, CRCL up 0.45%, and MARA up 0.84%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Meta's USDC Payout Pilot Targets Creator Economy Growth
data.description:
Meta has initiated a USDC creator payout pilot on April 29, focusing on selected creators in Colombia and the Philippines. According to NS3.AI, this move aims to tap into a creator economy that Goldman Sachs valued at approximately $250 billion in 2023. To participate, eligible creators are required to connect a compatible wallet to receive USDC via Meta's payout system on Solana and Polygon networks.

The pilot's 10% adoption scenario suggests potential creator payments of $25 billion annually on stablecoin rails today, with projections rising to $48 billion by 2027, based on Goldman's market forecasts. Additionally, a report from the Bank for International Settlements (BIS) estimated around $390 billion in payment-related stablecoin flows by 2025. This positions the pilot as a potentially significant contributor to real-economy stablecoin usage, contingent on increased adoption.

data.title: GANA Payment Expands Token Integration into Web3 Ecosystem
data.description: GANA Payment has announced the integration of its token into the broader payment ecosystem, positioning it as a core governance token within the Web3 payment landscape. According to ChainCatcher, this integration marks a significant upgrade from its previous single-function role, transforming it into a crucial hub connecting payment, scenarios, and governance mechanisms. As application scenarios expand, GANA Payment is accelerating its entry into a Web3 payment ecosystem focused on real consumption and value circulation.

data.title: CoinW's "smart money on-chain" tracked whales shorting altcoins and profited over ten million, now supporting "zero-profit" copy trading.
data.description: According to CoinW's "Smart Money on Chain" monitoring, the on-chain whale "Short Altcoin Guy" (address: 0xa312114b5795dff9b8db50474dd57701aa78ad1e) is earning high profits by continuously shorting multiple altcoins and meme coins, including LIT. Platform data shows that this whale has already achieved profits of $3.19 million on LIT and $2.11 million on ASTER, with a cumulative profit of $10.44 million over the past 90 days. It is understood that CoinW's "Smart Money on Chain" now supports copy trading of this address, with users receiving "0% commission." Risk Warning: The above information is based on historical on-chain data and does not constitute any investment advice or profit guarantee. Digital asset trading carries high risk; past performance is not indicative of future returns. Users should make prudent decisions based on their own risk tolerance.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 76,000 USDT with a 2.27% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 30, 2026, 10:26 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 76,000 USDT and is now trading at 75,994.257813 USDT, with a narrowed 2.27% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: A whale deposited its last 220 BTC into Binance, holding the position for three years and making a profit of $28 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale deposited its last 220 BTC (worth $16.72 million) into Binance, and after holding them for three years, it profited $28 million. This whale initially withdrew 370 BTC (worth $6.23 million) from Binance, which it has now deposited back into Binance, bringing the total value to $34.24 million.

data.title: Kremlin: Russia's Economic Contraction in Q1 2026 is an Expected Cooling Process
data.description: The Kremlin has stated that the economic contraction experienced by Russia in the first quarter of 2026 is part of an anticipated cooling process. According to Jin10, this development aligns with forecasts and is not unexpected. The statement suggests that the Russian government had foreseen this economic trend and considers it a normal phase in the country's economic cycle.

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Jason Exits Position Amid Losses
data.description: A prominent Bitcoin whale known as Jason has reportedly exited his position, incurring significant losses. According to Foresight News, Jason's stop-loss point for his long position was approximately $76,061, based on the estimated time of his tweet. His initial entry price was $77,686.5. If the long position involved 397.718 BTC, the estimated loss would be around $646,000. Alternatively, if the position was 2,759.11 BTC, the loss could be approximately $4.485 million.

data.title: Pharos PROS's FDV surpasses $1.1 billion; share swap terms with GCL New Energy essentially finalized.
data.description: On April 30th, Pharos officially announced that its token PROS, launched on the 28th, had met the valuation benchmark set by GCL Group for its strategic investment. The preconditions for the initial token swap have been largely met, and both parties are currently completing the final regulatory procedures. GCL Group, a leading industrial enterprise among the world's top 500 brands, will have its subsidiary GCL New Energy (451.HK) deeply collaborate with Pharos. Subsequently, Pharos will leverage GCL's overseas new energy and computing power assets to build a global A2A decentralized trading market based on real-world assets. By accumulating industry operation data, Pharos will explore new business models beyond the traditional gas fee-based profit model of public blockchains. The Pharos team has pledged that the profits from the collaboration with leading enterprises will be used for PROS buybacks in the long term, and dividends from its holdings of listed company shares will be airdropped to PROS holders. Previously, according to market information, Pharos' price was above $1.1 in the first hour of trading on April 28th, with a short-term FDV exceeding $1.1 billion.

data.title: CertiK and RootData Collaborate to Enhance Web3 Security and Transparency
data.description:
CertiK and RootData have announced a strategic partnership to launch a dual benchmark brand initiative focused on enhancing security and transparency in the Web3 industry. According to ChainCatcher, this collaboration aims to establish 'security and transparency' as key trust indicators within the sector.

CertiK, a leading global Web3 security service provider, utilizes its Skynet platform to conduct multi-dimensional security assessments through a comprehensive security scoring system. RootData, an industry-leading Web3 asset data platform, has developed an innovative transparency scoring model that evaluates token economics, team background, and compliance audits.

Through this partnership, CertiK will leverage RootData's standardized data interface to expand the scope and depth of its security ratings. Meanwhile, RootData will incorporate CertiK's expert security evaluations to provide authoritative calibration for its transparency scores. Together, they aim to promote the 'CertiK Skynet Score + RootData Transparency Score' dual evaluation standard, offering a reliable reference for projects, exchanges, investment institutions, and users seeking both security and transparency.

data.title: WasabiCard Issues Security Statement on Project Independence
data.description: WasabiCard has released a security statement clarifying that it has no affiliations with Wasabi Protocol, Wasabi Wallet, or any related projects and institutions. According to ChainCatcher, WasabiCard collaborates with Safeheron for custodial wallet services, utilizing private key sharding technology to ensure the security of on-chain funds. The company also works with blockchain security firm SlowMist to conduct thorough audits of the sources of on-chain funds. Additionally, WasabiCard employs compliance and anti-money laundering tools such as Sumsub to ensure user identity legality and compliance. As a licensed institution and Web3 financial infrastructure service provider, WasabiCard emphasizes that security and compliance are integral to its operations, not merely additional features.

data.title: Gate DEX BountyDrop is now available for airdrops via IOTRADER.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate DEX's BountyDrop has launched an IOTRADER airdrop event. Users can participate in tasks through the "Events" page of the Gate DEX App. 1,000 participants will be randomly selected from all those who complete the tasks to share $15,000 IOI. Gate Wallet is an industry-leading multi-chain crypto wallet, connecting 100+ public chains, millions of assets, and tens of thousands of DApps in one place, providing a professional-grade DEX experience and optimal solutions for every DEX need. BountyDrop is a dedicated earning activity section on the Gate DEX Discover page. Users can complete simple tasks for a chance to win rewards or participate in a lottery to receive airdropped tokens.

data.title: "Set 10 major targets first" - stop loss on BTC long positions again, with expected losses of $646,000 or $4,485,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the user "Set 10 Big Targets First" has once again stopped out of the market. Based on the time of the tweet, the stop-loss point for this user's BTC long position was estimated at approximately $76,061, while the previous opening price was $77,686.5. If the long position consisted of 397.718 BTC, the expected loss would be approximately $646,000; if the long position consisted of 2,759.11 BTC, the expected loss would be approximately $4,485,000.

data.title: Bitget is supporting the growth and development of Web3 women in emerging markets such as the Philippines through its Blockchain4Her program.
data.description: Bitget, through its Blockchain4Her program, continues to advance Web3 education and community building for women in emerging markets such as the Philippines. This program focuses on providing women and young people with a systematic blockchain knowledge framework, helping them participate in the long-term development of Web3 with a solid understanding and gain more substantial opportunities within the industry. To drive this goal, Blockchain4Her has prioritized supporting several grassroots initiatives launched by local women advocates. These include: translating blockchain technology into real development opportunities in underdeveloped communities; developing a dedicated learning resource, the "Young Learners’ Encyclopedia," for young people; and building a learning community focused on risk control and trading discipline. These initiatives not only help local beginners avoid misinformation and build a rational understanding of Web3, but also align deeply with Bitget's goal of collaborating with UNICEF to promote digital skills and blockchain education globally. Bitget CEO and Blockchain4Her founder Gracy Chen said, "Our initial goal was to provide a more equal and open environment for women to explore Web3. Seeing more and more outstanding women dedicating themselves to community building shows us how true industry inclusivity can take root and flourish from the grassroots."

data.title: Alibaba's Qwen-Scope Open Source Initiative Unveiled
data.description: Alibaba has announced the open-sourcing of Qwen-Scope, an interpretability module derived from the Qwen3 and Qwen3.5 series models. According to Foresight News, the module is designed for various applications, including directional control of inference results, data classification and synthesis, model training and optimization, and evaluation of sample distribution analysis and comparison. The open-source release includes weights from seven large models, encompassing dense models and mixture of experts models from the Qwen3 and Qwen3.5 series, with a total of 14 sets of sparse autoencoder weights.

data.title: Binance Alpha to Remove Multiple Tokens from Featuring List
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, several tokens will be removed from the Binance Alpha featuring list due to non-compliance with the platform's standards. The removal is scheduled for 2026-04-30 at 09:30 (UTC). The affected tokens include REX (Revox), XO (Xociety Token), TANSSI (TANSSI), DARKSTAR (DarkStar), YALA (Yala), RCADE (RCADE), RDAC (Redacted), SKATE (Skate), OVL (Overlay Protocol), SLAY (SatLayer), Ghibli (Ghiblification), Ghibli (GhibliCZ), PHY (DePHY Network), VLR (Velora), SVSA (SavannaSurvival), WBAI (Whitebridge Network), EDGEN (LayerEdge), FAIR3 (Fair and Free), MM (MOMOFUN), BUBB (Bubb), AICell (AICell), XLAB (Dexlab), and SIGHT (Empire of Sight).

Binance emphasizes its commitment to fostering innovation and transparency while prioritizing user protection. Despite the removal, users will still be able to sell or withdraw these tokens on Binance Alpha. To do so, users can navigate to the Binance Wallet's Market tab to search and trade, or use the Asset tab in Binance Alpha to select the token for instant selling or withdrawal. Binance advises users to exercise caution, as tokens on Binance Alpha may pose higher risks and be subject to significant price volatility. Users are encouraged to conduct thorough research to understand the projects before trading.

Binance also highlights the importance of risk management and advises users to be aware of potential discrepancies between the original English content and any translated versions. The platform has introduced a regular review mechanism to remove unqualified tokens, enhancing transparency and alerting the community to fraudulent third-party impersonations. Binance reserves the right to amend or cancel this announcement at any time without prior notice. Users are reminded that digital asset prices are subject to high market risk and volatility, and they should consult independent financial advisers before making investment decisions.
